title: German Chicken Satay
description: A twist on traditional German cuisine with the flavors of Malaysian satay, featuring succulent chicken skewers grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: malaysian satay spices
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together peanut sauce, satay spices, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the skewers with vegetable oil and season with salt and black pepper.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Brush the skewers with honey during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
8. Garnish with rosemary sprigs and serve hot with additional peanut sauce for dipping.
9. Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
